name: Outreach: Log Touch

description.en: Record a single outreach interaction (WhatsApp, email, LinkedIn, post, call) on a CRM contact with structured meta so A/B tests and funnel analytics stay trackable.
description.de: Eine Outreach-Interaktion (WhatsApp, E-Mail, LinkedIn, Post, Anruf) bei einem CRM-Kontakt mit strukturiertem Meta protokollieren — A/B-Tests und Funnel-Analytics bleiben auswertbar.

bot: Use this to record an outreach touch after sending a WhatsApp, email, LinkedIn message, post or call. Passes the template ID and variant used so reply-rate per template/variant stays computable later. Writes to the generic contact-activity endpoint with structured meta — no outreach-specific API code.

inputs.name: Contact

description.en: The contact who was reached out to

inputs.bot: The hashid of the CRM contact the outreach was sent to.

inputs.name: Description
inputs.bot: Short free-text context, e.g. the actual message sent or the agent's observation.

inputs.name: Channel
inputs.bot: One of: whatsapp, sms, email, linkedin, post, call.

inputs.name: Template ID
inputs.bot: Stable slug like 'handwerk-seq-a-m1' or 'kanzlei-linkedin-connect'. Used to aggregate reply rates per template.

inputs.name: Variant
inputs.bot: Single token like 'a' or 'b'. Omit for templates without variants.

inputs.name: Sequence Step

description.en: Which step in the sequence (1 = first touch, 2 = follow-up, …)
description.de: Welcher Schritt in der Sequenz (1 = Erstkontakt, 2 = Follow-up, …)

inputs.bot: Integer 1..20. Omit for single-touch templates (defaults to 1 on the analytics side).
